name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue handbag is exquisite and elegant, further enriching the classic design. Crafted from rose beige patent calfskin, the rounded flap features a refined curve and is accented with a vintage gold-finish metal CD turnlock, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Small size, with a pleated design and a refined silhouette, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
name_cn:

The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Small size, with a pleated design and a refined silhouette, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions: 18 x 10 x 4.5
0323
